name: ddvb-tech-plugins
description: DDVB TECH plugins for Claude Code — product scoping, brand strategy, brand naming, and more

plugins.name: ddvb-product-scoping
plugins.description: Product scoping from brainstorming to blueprints, and commercial proposal generation in ddvb.tech website format

plugins.name: ddvb-brand-strategy
plugins.description: End-to-end brand repositioning workflow: spec, plan, review, execute. Adaptive competitive research with industry-specific dimensions, SWOT/competitive analysis, brand platform, PPTX generation.

plugins.name: ddvb-brand-naming
plugins.description: Brand naming workflow: competitive research, copywriter brief, AI-assisted seed generation, candidate evaluation with scoring matrix, and client presentation.
